creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #23)
Good to know about pecl-imagick, thank you! Luckily we only use pecl-imagick-im7 on a few machines, I checked ImageMagick's config and we have OpenMP=off.
I upgraded another machine to 13.2 (this one has pecl-imagick-im7) and all machines with "elfctl -e +noaslr /usr/local/sbin/httpd" survived the midnight log rotation with SIGUSR1 a few minutes ago.
